text:
Sealing the Homunculus is the 47th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Ed arrives to rescue Al, whose armor has partially disintegrated. With Sloth, Wrath, and Lust all on the scene - and all with different motives - it's time for a homunculi showdown.

Trivia

This episode marks the deaths of Lust and Sloth, the second and third homunculi respectively to die in the series.
Ed finally confronts and repents his own sin by killing Sloth.
